CreateIndex.fulltext: Whether to enable full-text index; true means enabled
CreateIndex.caseSensitive: Whether full-text index is case-sensitive; default false (case-insensitive)
CreateIndex.includeChinese: Whether to include Chinese characters; default false (excluded)
CreateIndex.separators: Full-text tokenizer separators; uses default separators if not specified
CreateIndex.fields: Field names and type definitions included in the field index
